raw.message: Game on! New to BetRivers? Place your first qualifying sports bet. If it doesn’t win, you’ll get Bonus Bets back, because every player deserves a comeback.

hook.summary: High-contrast display of a $500 bonus offer over a basketball stadium background.
hook.visual_action: Large yellow text '$500' flashes on screen, followed by the 'NEW PLAYERS' headline and a cutout of NBA star Chris Paul.
hook.text_overlay: NEW PLAYERS UP TO $500 SECOND CHANCE BONUS BET

scene_flow: Initial flash of '$500' text over a blurred basketball arena background.
Headline 'NEW PLAYERS' and 'SECOND CHANCE BONUS BET' appear to define the promotion.
A cutout image of Chris Paul and the BetRivers logo slide into the frame.
Final layout settles with the deposit code 'SPORTS' and a 'BET NOW' call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans and casual bettors looking for high-value sign-up incentives and brand trust via celebrity endorsement.
